name: content-factory
description: Content Factory — AI 内容生产平台（Sprint 1：任务管理基础）

scripts.db:wait: until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d content_factory; do sleep 1; done
scripts.migrate:up: dotenv -e .env -- node-pg-migrate up -m db/migrations -j js -d DATABASE_ADMIN_URL
scripts.migrate:down: dotenv -e .env -- node-pg-migrate down -m db/migrations -j js -d DATABASE_ADMIN_URL
scripts.migrate:up:test: dotenv -e .env -- node-pg-migrate up -m db/migrations -j js -d DATABASE_ADMIN_URL_TEST
